title: Foo Bar Multi-Dimensional Query Builder
description: Build a query builder API that supports filtering and grouping by multiple dimensions (date, region, product). Choose appropriate storage (ClickHouse vs Postgres) per data type and expose a unified query interface.

tasks.description: Implement an API or query layer that accepts dimension filters (date range, region, product_id) and returns aggregated metrics. Use ClickHouse for analytics, Postgres for dimensions.

infrastructure.description: Postgres with dimension tables (regions, products). ClickHouse with fact table (events with ts, region_id, product_id, value). Build unified query API.
